title: Thumb capo merusalt hit sfx
description: This resource pack just changes the hit sound to limbus company sfx of the id called thumb capo merusalt
body:
I love Thumb capo merusalt so i gotta add the big T but since i can't model, i jsut decided to do a custom hit sfx for the goat 
it works 26.1-1.20
even if it said wrong version in the resource pack loader don't mind it, it will still load might work for older or newer version idk but i haven't check
enjoy :)
